description: MCP server for CIPP — M365 multi-tenant management for MSPs (users, tenants, policies).
name: io.github.wyre-technology/cipp-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your CIPP API instance (e.g. https://cipp-api.example.com)
environmentVariables.name: CIPP_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Entra ID application (client) ID used to authenticate to CIPP
environmentVariables.name: CIPP_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Entra ID client secret for the CIPP application
environmentVariables.name: CIPP_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Entra ID tenant ID hosting the CIPP application registration
environmentVariables.name: CIPP_TENANT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: CIPP
